svg.title: RevCycleMGMT RCM Dashboard KPI workspace proof
svg.desc: Synthetic four-view dashboard workspace: headline scorecard, 13-week trend, breakdowns, and 30-day action plan.
svg.metadata: { "boundary": "synthetic-only", "as_of": "2026-05-11", "freshness_days": 7, "headline_kpis": [ { "key": "clean_claim_rate", "label": "Clean claim rate", "current": 0.916, "target": 0.95, "current": 0.872, "target": 0.92, "unit": "percent", "status": "red", "stale": false, "owner": "Biller", "definition": "Synthetic claims accepted and adjudicated without rework on the first path." }, svg.text: RCM Dashboard KPI Framework | Synthetic only
A clinic owner sees what to fix first.
Headline KPIs, 13-week movement, breakdown risk, and a 30-day operating plan generated from one synthetic batch.
Split medical-necessity review from posting cleanup.
All KPI values, payer labels, dates, dollar figures, and workqueue signals are synthetic demo data.
